reason: Contract generation and frontend consumption must be checked after DTO shape changes.
Resource surface read behavior must stay aligned with VFS surface invariants.
Runtime action invocation must not bypass actor/context admission.
Frontend must consume generated Canvas DTOs without hand-written protocol drift.
Checks must verify implementation reuses CanvasAgentRunContext instead of creating a parallel binding layer.
Checks must preserve the existing AgentRun Canvas runtime state ownership model.
Checks must verify Workspace Module operate/invoke/present consume the shared runtime context for session, backend, VFS and Canvas state facts.
Checks must verify Canvas runtime surface updates use the shared Workspace Module runtime context and keep AgentFrame/VFS projection in sync.
Checks must verify Workspace Module tool providers no longer maintain a parallel runtime fact assembly.
Checks must verify the implementation continues to use AgentRun current runtime surface as the source for VFS/backend projection.
